top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 10-48 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 Block 5 will launch the Starlink Group 10-48 mission, deploying 29 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for the launch from Cape Canaveral.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G2 geomagnetic storm is expected, offering a good chance to view auroras for observers at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check the skies if you're above 60° latitude.

top_events.title: Long March 6A | Unknown Payload
top_events.description: China's Long March 6A rocket is set to launch with an unknown payload, marking another step in their space endeavors.
top_events.action: Follow updates for more information on the payload.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
